历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 9728 → 10822 → 12250 → 12272 → 14801, showing a continuous backward trend overall. In the last 3 years, the cumulative backward shift was about 5079 places, with the 2025 baseline around 14801, and the backward shift has significantly accelerated. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 128 students in both 2021 and 2022, increased to 134 in 2023 and 2024, and further increased to 143 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 156 students, an increase of 13 students (+9.1%) compared to 2025, and the increase in enrollment places slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 60–65 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. No obvious negative signals in reputation evaluation for 2026; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 52nd (relatively hot), with medium-high short video exposure, and application attention at a normal to slightly hot level; no history of enrollment gaps. Hydraulic Engineering A+ (top in China), Civil Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, with 3 A-level disciplines. Hydraulic Engineering is the university's flagship discipline, strongly attracting engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with the university's advantageous engineering fields. The number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province has grown from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, with an estimated 204,000 in 2026 (+6.1%), and the expansion of the examinee pool intensifies competition. The provincial control score line was 441 in 2025, with little fluctuation in recent years. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, which is a cross-province application for Fujian examinees, with no obvious regional preference bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 9.1% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the approximately 6.1% increase in provincial Physics Category examinees, the expansion rate is slightly larger than the examinee growth rate. However, the recent strong inertia of ranking backward shift suggests that competition will still slightly intensify in 2026. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15658, with a range of 15158–16158.

If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<15158), you can focus on aiming for flagship majors such as Water Resources Dayu Class and Electrical Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>16158), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 majors with high discipline evaluations such as Civil Engineering and Environmental Engineering, while leveraging the university's level advantage.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years; no obvious negative signals in 2026 reputation evaluation; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 52nd (relatively hot), with normal to high application attention; no record of enrollment gaps in history; Hydraulic Engineering A+, Civil Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, all engineering disciplines, which have no direct subject mapping with History Category majors (Law, Accounting, English, etc.), but the university's overall strong engineering positioning has a brand radiation effect on liberal arts majors.

预测结论.text: Considering the historical rankings that have shifted backward and then stabilized, the significant enrollment reduction of 23.5% in 2026, and the slight increase of 6.3% in the number of History Category examinees in the province, the enrollment reduction far exceeds the examinee increase, leading to significantly intensified competition, and the ranking is expected to shift further backward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1978, with a range of 1622–2334.
